title: Exact and Approximate Nearest-Neighbor Indexes · Program Brief: Rag Hnsw Graph Tradeoff
summary: An HNSW index is called exact, its recall is measured against itself, tenant filters are applied after top-k, and memory or build cost is absent from the decision. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the hnsw graph tradeoff increment in ANN recall, latency, and resource experiment. Learners progress through pred…
objectives: Explain and tune HNSW construction, search breadth, graph degree, recall, latency, memory, updates, and deletion behavior.
Build an exact flat-search oracle on a bounded corpus for correctness, recall comparison, and changed-filter tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-hnsw-graph-tradeoff — Explain and tune HNSW construction, search breadth, graph degree, recall, latency, memory, updates, and deletion behavior.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ann-indexes-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ann-indexes-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_ann_indexes_4(vectors: int = 10000, dimensions: int = 384, exact_recall: float = 0.96, latency_ms: float = 18.0, memory_mb: int = 96, filtered: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if vectors <= 0 or dimensions <= 0:
        return False, 0.0, "index-shape"
    if not 0.0 <= exact_recall <= 1.0:
        return False, exact_recall, "recall-range"
    if latency_ms <= 0.0 or memory_mb <= 0:
        return False, latency_ms, "resource-measurement"
    if not filtered:
        return False, exact_recall, "filter-recall"
    utility = exact_recall / latency_ms
    assert utility > 0.0
    return True, round(utility, 5), "ann-tradeoff"

# Evidence: rag-hnsw-graph-tradeoff-7kn9b0
# Competency: rag-hnsw-graph-tradeoff.

# Operating constraint: keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects.

def evidence_rag_hnsw_graph_tradeoff_7kn9b0(vectors: int = 10000, dimensions: int = 384, exact_recall: float = 0.96, latency_ms: float = 18.0, memory_mb: int = 96, filtered: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_7kn9b0 = "7kn9b0-0b9nk7-7636"
    assert evidence_variant_7kn9b0
    evidence_axes_7kn9b0 = (
        "corpus7kn9b0",
        "query0b9nk7",
        "tenant7636",
        "index7kn9b07636",
        "prompt0b9nk77636",
        "evaluation76367kn9b0",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_7kn9b0)) == 6
    if vectors <= 0 or dimensions <= 0:
        return False, 0.0, "index-shape"
    if not 0.0 <= exact_recall <= 1.0:
        return False, exact_recall, "recall-range"
    if latency_ms <= 0.0 or memory_mb <= 0:
        return False, latency_ms, "resource-measurement"
    if not filtered:
        return False, exact_recall, "filter-recall"
    utility = exact_recall / latency_ms
    assert utility > 0.0
    return True, round(utility, 5), "ann-tradeoff"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Explain and tune HNSW construction, search breadth, graph degree, recall, latency, memory, updates, and deletion behavior.
